requirement_topic.en: CEB SSDG/MSDG Grid Connection — IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: CEB SSDG/MSDG并网——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: CEB SSDG/MSDG併網——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Mauritius rooftop and distributed solar PV projects are connected through Central Electricity Board (CEB) small-scale and medium-scale distributed generation schemes, commonly referred to as SSDG and MSDG. Inverter approval is tied to the CEB connection application, technical review, metering arrangement, commissioning, and project-specific connection conditions. Mauritius uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz network, nominally aligned with China frequency but not automatically with Chinese protection settings. IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence are the expected IEC-aligned grid documents for PV inverters, together with local CEB settings and any URA-approved scheme conditions.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯屋顶和分布式太阳能光伏项目通过中央电力局（CEB）小规模和中规模分布式发电计划接入，通常称为SSDG和MSDG。逆变器批准与CEB接入申请、技术审查、计量安排、调试及项目特定接入条件绑定。毛里求斯使用230/400 V、50 Hz电网，频率名义上与中国一致，但不代表中国保护整定自动适用。IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，是光伏逆变器预期的IEC对齐并网文件，并需结合CEB当地整定和任何URA批准的计划条件。
summary.zht: 模里西斯屋頂和分散式太陽能光伏項目通過中央電力局（CEB）小規模和中規模分散式發電計畫接入，通常稱為SSDG和MSDG。逆變器批准與CEB接入申請、技術審查、計量安排、調試及項目特定接入條件綁定。模里西斯使用230/400 V、50 Hz電網，頻率名義上與中國一致，但不代表中國保護整定自動適用。IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，是光伏逆變器預期的IEC對齊併網文件，並需結合CEB當地整定和任何URA批准的計畫條件。

standards_or_laws: CEB SSDG and MSDG distributed-generation scheme requirements for rooftop and distributed solar PV connection
Utility Regulatory Authority (URA) approval and regulatory oversight for electricity-sector schemes in Mauritius
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Mauritius low-voltage supply context — 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power-station connection, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or protection tests. These documents are based on Chinese grid-operator practice and Chinese voltage/protection assumptions. They do not create automatic acceptance under Mauritius CEB SSDG/MSDG connection review, even though both countries use 50 Hz nominal frequency.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408-2021逆变器技术要求以及国内防孤岛或保护测试。上述文件基于中国电网运营实践和中国电压/保护假设。即使两国标称频率均为50 Hz，这些文件也不会在毛里求斯CEB SSDG/MSDG接入审查下自动获得接受。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408-2021逆變器技術要求以及國內防孤島或保護測試。上述文件基於中國電網運營實務和中國電壓/保護假設。即使兩國標稱頻率均為50 Hz，這些文件也不會在模里西斯CEB SSDG/MSDG接入審查下自動獲得接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid files should be supplemented with IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, a configuration record for Mauritius 230/400 V 50 Hz protection settings, and the CEB SSDG/MSDG project submission package. Exporters should confirm whether the inverter model is acceptable to CEB for the project size, metering arrangement, and connection point before shipment. China certificates are supporting documents only; they do not replace URA/CEB scheme approval and final CEB connection.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件应补充IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、毛里求斯230/400 V 50 Hz保护整定配置记录，以及CEB SSDG/MSDG项目提交包。出口商应在出货前确认逆变器型号是否被CEB接受用于相应项目规模、计量安排和接入点。中国证书仅属支持文件，不能替代URA/CEB计划审批和CEB最终接入。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件應補充IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、模里西斯230/400 V 50 Hz保護整定配置記錄，以及CEB SSDG/MSDG項目提交包。出口商應在出貨前確認逆變器型號是否被CEB接受用於相應項目規模、計量安排和接入點。中國證書僅屬支持文件，不能替代URA/CEB計畫審批和CEB最終接入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for CEB SSDG/MSDG grid connection and project commissioning; URA/CEB scheme approval and CEB connection are project gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese grid-operator expectations but is not transferable to Mauritius CEB connection approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat CEB SSDG/MSDG approval and connection as the controlling Mauritius grid gate. Chinese GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408-2021, and NB/T 32004 documents are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence or for CEB project review. Validate inverter firmware and protection settings for Mauritius 230/400 V at 50 Hz before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将CEB SSDG/MSDG审批和接入视为毛里求斯并网的控制性门槛。中国GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004文件不能自动替代IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据或CEB项目审查。调试前须针对毛里求斯230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证逆变器固件和保护整定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將CEB SSDG/MSDG審批和接入視為模里西斯併網的控制性門檻。中國GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004文件不能自動替代IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據或CEB項目審查。調試前須針對模里西斯230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證逆變器韌體和保護整定。
